tools.name: bash
tools.description: Execute a bash command in an isolated directory.

tools.name: export_state
tools.description:
Export the full core state as JSON.

Round-trips with import_state. State is keyed by snake_case entity-class
name (e.g. ``project``, ``employee``, ``slack_message``).

tools.name: import_state
tools.description:
Replace the full core state with the provided JSON.

For synthetic-data injection and test setup. Round-trips with export_state.

state.description: Empty state — core has no DB to snapshot.

tools.name: listFiles
tools.description: List files and subdirectories in a directory inside the sandbox.

directory.description: Directory to list, relative to the sandbox root. Use /workdir/ prefix or an absolute path within the sandbox to be explicit. Defaults to the sandbox root.

tools.name: prepareGradingContext
tools.description:
Prepare the text_for_grading string for rubric evaluation.

Collects file evidence from the sandbox, formats as XML,
and prepends to the agent's final_output.

Args:
    final_output: The agent's final response text.
    directory: Root directory to search. Defaults to the sandbox directory.
    extensions: Only include files with these extensions (without dot).
    exclude_patterns: Directory/file name patterns to skip.
    max_files: Maximum number of files to include as evidence. Eligible files
        beyond this cap are omitted but reported (logged and listed in the
        XML under <files_omitted_due_to_max_files>) rather than dropped
        silently. Defaults to DEFAULT_MAX_FILES.
    max_content_bytes: Maximum bytes of content to read per file.

Returns:
    The assembled text_for_grading string.

tools.name: readFile
tools.description: Read a file from the sandbox, with optional offset/limit (bytes) for paginating large files.

file_path.description: Path to the file. Use /workdir/ prefix for sandbox files, or an absolute path within the sandbox.

offset.description: Byte offset to start reading from. Use 0 for the beginning or a previous call's next_offset to continue.

limit.description: Maximum number of bytes to read. Defaults to 200000. Pass null to read from offset to end of file.

tools.name: readMedia
tools.description: Read an image, PDF, audio, or video file and return it as multimodal MCP content (base64-encoded, capped at 20 MiB; images auto-resized to model limits, large PDFs read in page ranges).

file_path.description: Path to an image (gif/jpeg/png/webp), PDF, audio (wav/mp3/aiff/aac/ogg/flac), or video (mp4/mpeg/mov/avi/flv/webm/wmv/3gpp) file. Use /workdir/ prefix for sandbox files, or an absolute path within the sandbox. Returns multimodal MCP content; images are automatically downscaled/re-encoded to fit model limits (max 2000px on the long edge). Audio/video require a model with native audio/video support (e.g. Gemini) — other models see only a text placeholder. Use readFile for text and readPDF for PDF text extraction.

pages.description: PDF page range to read, 1-indexed, e.g. '3' or '1-10' (max 20 pages per read). Required for PDFs over 20 pages or 10 MiB. Ignored for images.

tools.name: readPDF
tools.description: Extract text from a PDF file inside the sandbox.

tools.name: writeFile
tools.description: Write content to a file in an isolated sandbox.
